1.title: CPUUtilization
1.query:
timeseries cpu_utilization = avg(cloud.aws.ec.cpu_utilization),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(cpu_utilization) desc
| limit 20

2.title: CPUUtilization (by CacheNodeId)
2.query:
timeseries cpu_utilization_by_cache_node_id = avg(cloud.aws.ec.cpu_utilization_by_cache_node_id),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(cpu_utilization_by_cache_node_id) desc
| limit 20
